LanguageData.VQE_StudiedAncientGenetron.description: This particular colonist has studied the ancient ARC. It allows them to build, upgrade and maintain an ARC in the colony.
LanguageData.VQE_StudiedAncientGenetron.label: studied ancient ARC
LanguageData.VQE_StudiedAncientGeothermalGenetron.des: This particular colonist has studied the ancient geothermal ARC. It allows them to build, upgrade and maintain a geothermal ARC in the colony.
LanguageData.VQE_StudiedAncientNuclearGenetron.descri: This particular colonist has studied a nuclear ARC husk. It allows them to build, upgrade and maintain a nuclear ARC in the colony.
LanguageData.VQE_StudiedAncientNuclearGenetron.label: studied nuclear ARC husk
LanguageData.VQE_TraitorousInventor.description: Traitorous inventor. This hediff shouldn't be visible to players. If you are seeing this you will go to cheater hell, which is full of politicians.
LanguageData.VQE_TraitorousInventor.label: traitorous inventor
